translated: There are so many different feelings involved.
Sometimes you feel like you're going to be crushed by your own thoughts, but in those moments,
if you have that feeling of not wanting to lose or back down, you can hold onto yourself more strongly.
Hagiyama-chan is seriously so strong.
Really.
I ended up learning a lot from her too.
Just like Shizuku did.
Truly.
When someone has a heart that strong, I feel like I'm about to grow wings myself.
Like I'm ready to take flight.
I'll do my best right alongside Shizuku.
I look forward to working with you all.
That's what I wanted to say.
I learn so much from this.
The stories in ProSeka are just, seriously...
They're so educational for me.
They've become a source of emotional support.
I'd be so happy if they resonate with all of you in the same way.
Everyone is telling me "Let's do our best!"
Let's do it together, everyone.
Supporting each other.
Thank you for the support.
I'll work hard.
My heart is right there with Shizuku.
With that, I have no regrets.
I made sure to memo everything I wanted to talk about, and I've said it all.
